LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH TOM'S MOTION TO DETERMINE PARTY PREVAILING ON CONTRACT & TO FIX AMOUNT OF ATTYS FEES AWARDABLE AS ITEM OF COSTS -- PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST OF $8,275.41 IS REDUCED TO $4,319.67. THE COURT REDUCED FEES AND COSTS BY $2,712.50 AND REDUCED COSTS OF THE FEE MOTION BY $450. THE COURT DOES NOT PERMIT PER DIEM RENTAL COSTS. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED FROM DEFANDANTS $3,519.67 IN FEES AND COSTS AND $800.00 FOR PREPARATION OF THIS MOTION FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4,319.67. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

calendar.matters:
Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract & To Fix Amount Of Attys Fees Awardable As Item Of Costs
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel R. Stern, Esq., Wasserman-Taxman (415) 567-9600 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Tom
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH TOMd's motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract & To Fix Amount Of Attys Fees Awardable As Item Of Costs -- Plaintiff's request of $8,275.41 is reduced to $4,319.67. The Court reduced fees and costs by $2,712.50 and reduced costs of the fee motion by $450. The Court does not permit per diem rental costs. Plaintiff is awarded from Defandants $3,519.67 in fees and costs and $800.00 for preparation of this motion for a total amount of $4,319.67. Order and Judgment signed. (301/jlw/ds) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

David p. Wasserman, Esq. and Daniel R. Stern, Esq., Wasserman-Taxman (415) 567-9600, for Plaintiff and Moving Party Tom
Joseph Bravo, Esq., Bravo & Margulies (415) 512-6700 for Defendants and Opposing Party Sheldon
RULING:
HEARING HELD: Leif Nygaard, Chris Sheldon and Cari Sheldon sworn and examined. Email marked as Defendant Exhibit A; Letter of Apology marked as Defendant Exhibit B. A R G U E D.
PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH TOM'S Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement: GRANTED. Order signed. Exhibits returned. Fees imposed pursuant to GC 68086(a)(1) and 68086(b)(1). (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
